# paperclip-businesses

> Deploy fully autonomous AI-powered businesses on Paperclip in minutes. 9 AI agents run prospecting, selling, marketing, and delivering for under $5/day in AI costs.

## What This Repo Does

This is a template system for deploying autonomous AI businesses on the Paperclip platform. Each business runs 9 AI agents powered by kimi-k2.5 via OpenRouter through OpenCode. The agents handle the full business lifecycle: CEO strategy, marketing, operations, sales management, social media, and SDR outreach.

## Repo Structure

- template/agents/ -- 9 numbered agent prompt files (01_ceo.md through 09_sdr_warm_nurture.md)
- template/config/company.json -- company configuration (products, budgets, heartbeats, model settings)
- template/config/opencode.json -- OpenCode runtime configuration
- template/scripts/deploy.sh -- automated deployment script
- examples/ -- pre-built business models (uais-openclaw-agency, ai-gtm-agency)
- infrastructure/templates/ -- self-healing pipeline and security layer patterns
- rules/RULES.md -- business rules and operational constraints
- CLAUDE.md -- AI assistant operational rules (52 rules + session management)
- AGENTS.md -- agent architecture, coordination model, inter-agent dependencies

## Key Technical Details

- Platform: Paperclip (paperclip.ing)
- Runtime: OpenCode
- Model: kimi-k2.5 via OpenRouter (moonshotai/kimi-k2.5)
- Cost target: under $5/day total across all 9 agents
- Agent heartbeats range from 1h (SDRs) to 6h (CMO)
- Each agent has a daily token budget defined in company.json

## How to Use This Repo

1. Pick a business model from examples/ or create your own from template/
2. Customize company.json with your business details
3. Run deploy.sh to set up agents on Paperclip
4. Agents self-coordinate via the CEO agent hierarchy

## Important Constraints

- Total AI cost must stay under $5/day
- No hardcoded API keys or credentials in any file
- Agent prompts must respect token budgets in company.json
- SDR agents share prospect deduplication -- changes to one must be mirrored to others
- CEO agent changes cascade to all 8 downstream agents
